hero.title: Trading Journal
hero.subtitle: Log your trades, track your performance, and build consistency — all in one place.

resources.heading: Resources
resources.subheading: Videos, guides, and tools worth your time.

items.title: Mentorship in Georgian (bee). Basics of trading
items.description: Includes 22 video lessons covering fundamental topics in trading.

items.title: ICT Mentorship 2022
items.description: A full mentorship series covering ICT's core trading concepts from the ground up. Includes 41 video Lessons.

items.title: ICT Forex Course
items.description: A complete forex-focused course from ICT. Includes 24 video lessons covering the basics of forex trading.

items.title: 2016 ICT Private Mentorship Core Content Month 01
items.description: Month 1 of the ICT core concepts curriculum. The channel includes the full course (12 month), which is recommended.

items.question: Is Trading Journal free to use?
items.answer: Yes, the core journal features are free while the project is in development.

items.question: Can I use this on mobile?
items.answer: The app is being built responsively, so it will work on mobile browsers.

items.question: Where is my data stored?
items.answer: During local development, your data is stored locally. A hosted version is planned for the future.

footer.disclaimer: Futures and forex trading involve significant risk and are not suitable for every investor. An investor could potentially lose all or more than their initial investment. Risk capital is money that can be lost without jeopardizing one's financial security or lifestyle. Only risk capital should be used for trading, and only those with sufficient risk capital should consider trading. Past performance is not necessarily indicative of future results.
